todos.content: Delegate to web_agent: fetch Project Euler "recent problems" page, write /_outputs/problems.txt listing every problem found, create Python solver files for each under /_outputs/euler_solutions/, run them to compute answers and measure runtime, append answers and runtimes to problems.txt, and produce final report PDF at /_outputs/final_report.pdf.

Delegate to web_agent: fetch Project Euler "recent problems" page, write /_outputs/problems.txt listing every problem found, create Python solvers under /_outputs/euler_solutions/, run them to compute answers and runtimes, append answers and runtimes to problems.txt, and produce final report PDF at /_outputs/final_report.pdf.

Delegate to web_agent: fetch Project Euler problems 101–106, create/append entries in /_outputs/problems.txt, write Python solvers p0101.py–p0106.py under /_outputs/euler_solutions/, run each with a 120s timeout, record answers and runtimes back into problems.txt, update /_outputs/final_report.pdf to include these problems, and produce /_outputs/euler_solutions.zip.
Fetch Project Euler problem pages for IDs 101-106 using tvly extract
Update /_outputs/problems.txt with titles, statements and blank Answers
Create Python solver files under /_outputs/euler_solutions/ for each problem (p101.py..p106.py)
Run each solver with 120s timeout and record answers/timeouts
Update /_outputs/final_report.pdf with summary, algorithm descriptions, links, answers and timings
Create ZIP /_outputs/euler_solutions.zip containing all solver files
Fetch Project Euler problem pages for IDs 101-106 using tvly extract
Update /_outputs/problems.txt with titles, statements and blank Answers
Create Python solver files under /_outputs/euler_solutions/ for each problem (p101.py..p106.py)
Run each solver with 120s timeout and record answers/timeouts
Update /_outputs/final_report.pdf with summary, algorithm descriptions, links, answers and timings
Create ZIP /_outputs/euler_solutions.zip containing all solver files
